rationale: The skill installs npm dependencies (npm install reads/writes node_modules and package-lock.json, fetching from registry.npmjs.org) and runs a Node.js script that connects to Chrome's DevTools Protocol over a local WebSocket (127.0.0.1:9222) to read cookies. It then uploads those cookies to Browserbase via their API, requiring network access to browserbase.com endpoints. The follow-up workflow invokes the `browse` CLI subprocess for authenticated sessions, and Chrome itself may be launched with debugging flags using a /tmp/chrome-debug user data dir.
